abilities.description: Up to one target creature's base power perpetually becomes equal to its toughness. It perpetually gains "This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender."
abilities.target_prompt: Select up to one target creature

abilities.description: Conjure a Lumbering Lightshield card onto the battlefield.

effect.description: Conjure a Lumbering Lightshield card onto the battlefield.
effect.name: MakeCard

abilities.description: You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your end step, return target white creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. You gain life equal to its toughness."
